ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the precinct is located */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "polling_station" TEXT /* Name of the polling station */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the polling station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precincts_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each elected office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the elected office */,
  "office_type" TEXT /* Type of office (e.g., federal, state, local) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "district_type" TEXT /* Type of district (e.g., congressional, state legislative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the party of the candidate */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the candidate */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handle of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party */,
  "party_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., primary, general) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the vote was cast */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct where the vote was cast */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office contested */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district contested */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate receiving the votes */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "election_day_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast on election day */,
  "early_voting_votes" INTEGER /* Number of early voting votes */,
  "absentee_votes" INTEGER /* Number of absentee votes */,
  "provisional_votes" INTEGER /* Number of provisional votes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., election officer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was recorded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts_offices" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office contested in that district */,
  "is_contested" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the office is contested in the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id", "office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_elections" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "is_incumbent" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the candidate is an incumbent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id", "election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the report is for */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was created */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_registration" (
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the voter is registered */,
  "voter_name" TEXT /* Name of the voter */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the voter */,
  "party_affiliation" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the voter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_registration_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_history" (
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voter */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "voted" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the voter voted in the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voter_id", "election_id")
)
